messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

Just a quick update on the backend migration project: we're currently at 80% completion and everything is on track for Friday delivery as planned.

Please let me know if you have any questions or need additional details.

Best regards

content.delta: Done! I've sent the email to alice@example.com with the subject "Project Update" summarizing that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery. ✉️
